name: Billy Graham
title: Evangelist
bio: American evangelist and ordained Southern Baptist minister whose broadcasts and world tours spanning over six decades made him one of the most influential Christian leaders of the 20th century. He preached to live audiences of nearly 215 million people in more than 185 countries.
faith: Known as 'America's Pastor,' Graham preached a simple message of salvation through Jesus Christ. He served as spiritual advisor to multiple U.S. Presidents and founded the Billy Graham Evangelistic Association. His integrity and humility set a standard for public Christian ministry.

videos.title: Billy Graham Classic Crusade Sermons
videos.note: Hundreds of Graham's crusade sermons are available on YouTube

tagline: Preached the gospel to more people than anyone in history
